scripts.fonts:copy: mkdir -p stylesheet/dist/fonts && cp node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-500-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-600-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-700-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-ext-500-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-ext-600-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/open-sans/files/open-sans-latin-ext-700-normal.woff2 stylesheet/dist/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/files/dm-sans-latin-400-normal.woff2 node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/files/dm-sans-latin-ext-400-normal.woff2 stylesheet/dist/fonts/
